description:
A feature-rich College Management System built using React.js and Express.js.
This project is designed for academic use, real-world learning, and full-stack skill enhancement.

A File Sharing System built using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) with Cloudinary integration for handling file URLs. This project is part of my practice and learning, selected from the college project list.

SmartPark is a full-stack MERN-based parking management system designed to solve real-world urban parking challenges. It provides real-time parking slot availability, smart booking, and a powerful admin dashboard with a clean and responsive user experience.
An open-source developer tool that uses Gemini AI to instantly generate high-quality READMEs, API docs, and eliminate documentation debt.
